textByHash.163114ca98b34766e9ae1195f3f89c73bfa55b70: I'm sure that's not what you're meant to be slaying.
textByHash.37e84114f32d0204efcbc5c8a972cd43c05279b5: For the dragons, of course! I've always wanted to slay dragons. I've found they're a bit tough, though, even with all this kit I've got, but I'll slay them one day.
textByHash.74a9dea0ba33b401c5a86de0384570cb5a968408: No, you haven't got an assignment to slay these dragons. Go and train somewhere else.
textByHash.7df94e846d709661cbe9626de928dc139ed4a109: My little brother became a Slayer Master recently. That job should have been mine - he's just a little brat! But one day I'll be a mighty dragon-slayer, and they'll give me a job like that too.
textByHash.8e013a8d87d8f6ac4ed98181ccdbd7f52947e0be: Yes, certainly, since you've been assigned to do so.
textByHash.a6b0d026ad7c0d1b208609a6f72ad49aa5e0a7e5: Hey, down there! What is it?
textByHash.f8efd57018cd619d1209788f0d3731529f9a947b: My little cousin is a Slayer Master, lucky girl. But one day I'll be a mighty dragon-slayer, and they'll give me a job like that too.
